LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Nightkin.description: Forced Evolutionary Virus and stealth-field instability have fused into a Nightkin phenotype. Carriers turn purple, can trigger a self-camouflaging invisibility field, and suffer the dissociative schizophrenia common to advanced Nightkin degeneration.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Nightkin.label: nightkin stealth field
